parameters.query:
=SELECT jsonb_build_object(
 'window_days', {{ $json.days }},
 'period_start', (now()::date - {{ $json.days }}),
 'period_end', now()::date,
 'signals_this_period', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(x.j) FROM (
   SELECT jsonb_build_object(
     'type', s.type, 'summary', left(s.summary, 220), 'quote', left(s.quote, 140),
     'band', s.details->>'band', 'category', s.details->>'risk_category',
     'networks', s.details->>'networks_total', 'value_mentioned', s.details->>'value',
     'account', a.name, 'status', s.status, 'created', s.created_at::date) AS j
   FROM signals s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.created_at > now() - interval '{{ $json.days }} days'
   ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 50) x), '[]'::jsonb),
 'signal_counts_prev_period', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_object_agg(t.type, t.n) FROM (
     SELECT type, count(*) AS n FROM signals
     WHERE created_at BETWEEN now() - interval '{{ $json.days * 2 }} days' AND now() - interval '{{ $json.days }} days'
     GROUP BY type) t), '{}'::jsonb),
 'unresolved_risks', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'summary', s.summary, 'account', a.name, 'band', s.details->>'band',
     'age_days', (now()::date - s.created_at::date)))
   FROM (SELECT * FROM signals
     WHERE type = 'risk' AND status IN ('new','routed') AND created_at < now() - interval '14 days'
     ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 15) s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id), '[]'::jsonb),
 'recurring_themes', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('account', x.account, 'category', x.category, 'times', x.n)) FROM (
     SELECT a.name AS account, s.details->>'risk_category' AS category, count(*) AS n
     FROM signals s JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
     WHERE s.type = 'risk' AND s.created_at > now() - interval '{{ $json.days * 2 }} days' AND s.details->>'risk_category' IS NOT NULL
     GROUP BY a.name, s.details->>'risk_category' HAVING count(*) >= 2) x), '[]'::jsonb),
 'calls_per_account', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('account', x.account, 'this_period', x.tw, 'prev_period', x.pw)) FROM (
     SELECT a.name AS account,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE c.call_date > now() - interval '{{ $json.days }} days') AS tw,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE c.call_date BETWEEN now() - interval '{{ $json.days * 2 }} days' AND now() - interval '{{ $json.days }} days') AS pw
     FROM calls c JOIN accounts a ON a.id = c.account_id
     WHERE c.call_date > now() - interval '{{ $json.days * 2 }} days' GROUP BY a.name) x), '[]'::jsonb),
 'weekly_report_rags', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'project', w.project_title, 'account', w.account_name, 'rag', w.rag))
   FROM (SELECT * FROM weekly_reports WHERE week_ending > now() - interval '{{ $json.days + 3 }} days'
     ORDER BY week_ending DESC LIMIT 25) w), '[]'::jsonb),
 'open_pipeline', (SELECT jsonb_build_object('deals', count(*), 'value', COALESCE(sum(amount),0)) FROM deals WHERE is_open),
 'top_open_deals', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(x.j) FROM (
   SELECT jsonb_build_object('account', a.name, 'deal', left(d.name, 80), 'value', d.amount, 'stage', d.stage) AS j
   FROM deals d LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = d.account_id
   WHERE d.is_open ORDER BY d.amount DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12) x), '[]'::jsonb)
) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## tnAI brief - weekly + on-demand per window
Mondays 07:50 writes the 7-day brief. The dashboard's 7/14/30-day toggle calls the webhook (POST /webhook/tnai-brief-x7k2m9 {days:N}) via the API, which regenerates the brief over that window and saves it (period length = the window, so each window caches separately).

API needs env: N8N_BRIEF_WEBHOOK_URL=https://<this-n8n-host>/webhook/tnai-brief-x7k2m9
Workflow must be ACTIVE for the webhook to answer.
